completed_tasks.name: Phase 05-01: Backend export router (4 StreamingResponse endpoints)
Phase 05-02: Frontend export wiring on BugReportPage + SprintPage
Post-phase: Word sprint export includes all sprints (one section per sprint)
Post-phase: Excel sprint export includes all sprints (one sheet per sprint)
Post-phase: Fix Excel sheet title crash on sprint names with '/'

blockers.description: npm install EACCES on WSL NTFS mount (pre-existing, non-blocking)
blockers.workaround: Use Docker (docker-compose up --build). Backend must be rebuilt with --no-cache after requirements.txt changes.

blockers.description: Many .planning/ files show as modified in git status — NTFS CRLF/LF artifact, not real changes
blockers.workaround: Ignore. Run git diff to confirm only line-ending diffs. Stage only real source files when committing.

human_actions_pending.action: Manual UAT: test Excel and Word export downloads from Sprints page
human_actions_pending.context: All-sprints export now produces one sheet/section per sprint. Verify file opens correctly in Excel/Word.

decisions.decision: Excel bugs export = single sheet, columns: ID|Summary|Status|Priority|Assignee|Fix Version
decisions.rationale: Raw data so user can filter/sort in Excel

decisions.decision: Word BugReport = title+metadata+stats+donut chart (matplotlib, wedgeprops width=0.5)+bug table
Word Sprint (all-sprints) = cover page + one H1 section per sprint with metadata+summary+bug table
decisions.rationale: User requested all sprints in report

decisions.decision: Excel Sprint (all-sprints) = one worksheet per sprint; sheet name = sprint name sanitized (strip / \ * ? : [ ][:31])
decisions.rationale: User requested all sprints; Excel sheet names disallow those chars

decisions.decision: No get_current_user auth dep on export endpoints — ambient OAuth
decisions.rationale: Matches all other routers in codebase
Non-interactive backend; no display available in container

next_action: Project is 100% complete (5/5 phases). Optional: /gsd-audit-milestone or manual UAT of export downloads at http://localhost:3000.
context_notes: All 5 phases delivered. This session: fixed Docker backend (missing matplotlib), added BugReportPage transition animations, changed sprint export (both xlsx and docx) to include all sprints instead of just the active sprint, fixed Excel crash on sprint names containing '/'.
